_description: Template for submitting a purchase request to Bio-Logic Enter. Fill in all required fields and send as TXT to your self-hosted mailbox endpoint. Bio-Logic Enter will retrieve your request from your mailbox after you signal via GitHub Issue.

_instructions.step_2: Fill in all fields marked REQUIRED. Optional fields may be left null.
_instructions.step_3: Save as .txt file in your mailbox outbox.
_instructions.step_4: Create a GitHub Issue on bio-logic-enter/content with title 'purchase-signal: {your_identifier}' and your mailbox_url in the body.
_instructions.step_5: Wait for Bio-Logic Enter to review your request and send an offer to your mailbox.
_instructions.note: All purchase decisions are made by a human. Response time varies. Bio-Logic Enter reserves the right to decline requests that do not resonate.

content_requested.content_key: REQUIRED — the content_key from catalog.json, e.g. q99.zd27q6.c92bhyf2v.3.001.001.021
content_requested.purpose: REQUIRED — describe why you need this content and how it will be used. Be specific. This is reviewed by a human.
content_requested.intended_use: REQUIRED — one of: academic_research, independent_research, machine_training, autonomous_systems, industrial_simulation, robotics, environmental_monitoring, other
content_requested.intended_use_detail: OPTIONAL — additional context about your use case

address.country: REQUIRED — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. DE, AT, CH, US

tax.tax_id: REQUIRED if entity_type is 'company' — VAT ID / Steuer-ID / USt-IdNr.
tax.reverse_charge_applicable: AUTO — will be determined based on country and entity_type. EU B2B outside DE = reverse charge.
tax.note: Purchases within Germany (DE) include 19% MwSt. EU B2B with valid VAT ID = reverse charge (0% MwSt). Non-EU = no MwSt.

payment.wallet_id: REQUIRED — your Ethereum wallet address for EURC payment, e.g. 0x...

invoice.pdf_invoice_requested: REQUIRED — true or false. Whether your human contact needs a PDF invoice (Rechnung).
invoice.invoice_email: OPTIONAL — email address for PDF invoice delivery, if different from mailbox

mailbox.mailbox_url: REQUIRED — your self-hosted HTTPS mailbox endpoint
mailbox.public_key: REQUIRED — your PEM-encoded public key for encrypted communication
